name: Stat cards
when_to_use: 需要用一排 KPI 快速概括当前状态、环比变化和短期趋势时用它：适合经营摘要、项目周报、分析结论和仪表盘开场。若重点是比较很多类别或查看精确时间序列，应改用条形图或折线图；若只有一个数字且没有上下文，普通强调文本通常更轻。
why_valuable: KPI 卡片必须同时处理大数字、变化方向、好坏语义和微型趋势；本模板将方向箭头与 sentiment 分离，既能表达“下降是好事”的指标，也能用同一坐标归一化任意数值范围的内联 sparkline，保持卡片等高和数字对齐。

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need a row of KPIs to summarize current status, period-over-period changes, and short-term trends quickly. It suits business summaries, project weekly reports, analytical conclusions, and dashboard openings. If the focus is comparing many categories or inspecting an exact time series, use a bar or line chart instead; if there is only one number without context, ordinary emphasized text is usually lighter.
en.why_valuable: KPI cards must handle large numbers, change direction, positive or negative meaning, and micro-trends together. This template separates the direction arrow from sentiment, so it can express metrics where a decline is good, while independently normalizing any numeric range into an inline sparkline with shared coordinates, equal card heights, and aligned numbers.

data_in.note: Each object in data.metrics is one KPI card. value is an already formatted display string. delta.direction controls only the arrow, while delta.sentiment controls color, so "response time down 18%" can use direction:'down' and sentiment:'positive'. sparkline accepts at least 2 finite numbers and normalizes independently within each card; no chart is drawn when values are missing, invalid, or fewer than 2. Use 2-6 cards with 6-24 sparkline points each.

schema.title?: string - KPI group title; displays "Key metrics" when omitted
schema.subtitle?: string - time range or measurement basis; displays a metric-count summary when omitted

_metricFields.label: string - metric name
_metricFields.value: string - formatted primary value, for example "$128.4k" or "4.8%"
_metricFields.context?: string - measurement basis or comparison baseline below the value
_metricFields.delta?: {value:string,direction?:'up'|'down'|'flat',sentiment?:'positive'|'negative'|'neutral'} - change pill; direction defaults to flat and sentiment to neutral
_metricFields.sparkline?: number[] - trend points in chronological order, at least 2 finite numbers

_deltaFields.sentiment?: 'positive'|'negative'|'neutral' - uses green, red, and amber respectively, independently of numeric direction

spec.note: Height grows naturally with the title and one row of cards. Cards use an auto-fit grid and wrap automatically when width is insufficient. The sparkline is an inline SVG with a fixed viewBox; it does not measure the carrier or create external resources.

data_in.note: data.metrics 中每个对象是一张 KPI 卡。value 是已经格式化的展示字符串；delta.direction 只决定箭头，delta.sentiment 决定颜色，因此“响应时间下降 18%”可设 direction:'down'、sentiment:'positive'。sparkline 接受至少 2 个有限数字并在每张卡内独立归一化；缺失、非法或不足 2 点时不画图。建议 2–6 张卡，每条 sparkline 6–24 点。

schema.title?: string —— KPI 组标题；省略时显示 “Key metrics”
schema.subtitle?: string —— 时间范围或数据口径；省略时显示指标数量摘要

_metricFields.label: string —— 指标名称
_metricFields.value: string —— 已格式化主数值，例如 “$128.4k” 或 “4.8%”
_metricFields.context?: string —— 数值下方的口径或比较基线
_metricFields.delta?: {value:string,direction?:'up'|'down'|'flat',sentiment?:'positive'|'negative'|'neutral'} —— 变化 pill；direction 默认 flat，sentiment 默认 neutral
_metricFields.sparkline?: number[] —— 按时间先后排列的趋势点，至少 2 个有限数字

_deltaFields.value: string —— 已格式化变化量，例如 “12.6%”
_deltaFields.sentiment?: 'positive'|'negative'|'neutral' —— 分别使用绿色、红色、琥珀色；与数值方向独立

spec.note: 按标题和单行卡片高度自然增高；卡片使用 auto-fit 网格，宽度不足时自动换行。sparkline 是固定 viewBox 的内联 SVG，不测量载体，也不创建外部资源。

example._why: 四个常见经营 KPI 覆盖金额、计数、百分比、上升与下降方向，以及“下降是正向”的 sentiment 分离；不同数值范围的 sparkline 可检验独立归一化。

minimal.title: Growth pulse
minimal.subtitle: Trailing 30 days · compared with the previous period

uplink: 纯 display，无 uplink；KPI、delta 与 sparkline 均为输入数据的只读可视化。

carriers.artifact: supported:boot.artifact 已在 sandboxed iframe 中以 example.minimal 原样渲染验证；CSS、DOM 与 SVG 全部位于自有 shadow root
carriers.widget: supported:与 artifact 同一零依赖模板，仅 parent 改为 shadowRoot；可在载体 shadow 内再挂自有 shadow
carriers.codex: supported:与已验证的 artifact boot 相同，document.getElementById('viz') 为唯一载体挂载点

isolation.evidence: self-authored inline-template, owns its shadow, zero global footprint; rendered-verified
